name: marketbot
description: AI-powered market intelligence and trade-assist platform

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @marketbot/engine & npm run dev -w @marketbot/web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @marketbot/connectors -w @marketbot/risk -w @marketbot/tax -w @marketbot/broker && npm run build -w @marketbot/signals
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @marketbot/engine -w @marketbot/scheduler -w @marketbot/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.deploy:engine: npm run build:packages && npm run deploy:migrations -w @marketbot/engine && npm run deploy -w @marketbot/engine
